creator: olli@secnetix.de
text: Gavin Atkinson asked me to submit an entry for www/en/platforms/amd64/motherboards.sgml regarding a system that I mentioned in the -current mailing list. So here it is: HP ProLiant DL585 G2 nVidia nForce4 / Socket F - 4x dual-core Opteron Oliver Fromme (dmesg etc.) 7.0-STABLE Functional, but isp(4) FCA controller disabled and not tested. Fix: n/a How-To-Repeat: n/a
